recipe.title: CHILLED GOLDEN BEETROOT SOUP

steps.instruction: Cook the beetroot in a pan of salted water for about 1 hour until they feel tender when pierced with a knife. Drain and leave until cool enough to handle, then peel and roughly chop the beetroot.

ingredient_lines.raw_text: salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 small onion, peeled and roughly chopped

steps.instruction: Heat the oil in a large saucepan, add the onion, cover and cook gently for 3- 4 minutes to soften. Add the vegetable stock, bring to the boil, season with a little salt and pepper and simmer for 30 minutes.
Add the beetroot, then remove from the heat. Puree in a blender until smooth, then pass the soup through a fine-meshed sieve into a large bowl.
Re-season if necessary. Cool the soup down, then refrigerate for a few hours until well chilled or put it into the freezer if you're in a rush.
Serve in soup plates topped with a dollop of cream, creme fraTche or soft goat's cheese and a sprinkling of grated horseradish.
